parameters.query: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url FROM public.global_settings WHERE key IN ('n8n_base_url');

parameters.jsCode: const settings=$('Load Action Settings').first()?.json??{}; const request=$('Email Template Editor Actions Webhook').first()?.json??$input.first()?.json??{}; const body=request.body??request.query??request; const headers=request.headers??{}; const clean=(value)=>value===null||value===undefined?'':String(value).trim(); const parseId=(value)=>{const n=Number.parseInt(clean(value),10); return Number.isInteger(n)&&n>0?n:null;}; const parseType=(value)=>{const n=Number.parseInt(clean(value),10); return Number.isInteger(n)&&[0,1,2].includes(n)?n:0;}; const parseBool=(value)=>['1','true','yes','y','on'].includes(clean(value).toLowerCase()); const hasLiteralUndefined=(value)=>/\bundefined\b/i.test(String(value??'')); const deriveBaseUrl=(sourceHeaders,fallback)=>{const forwardedProto=clean(sourceHeaders['x-forwarded-proto']); const forwardedHost=clean(sourceHeaders['x-forwarded-host']); const host=forwardedHost||clean(sourceHeaders.host); const forwardedPort=clean(sourceHeaders['x-forwarded-port']); if(!host) return fallback; const proto=forwardedProto||'http'; let authority=host; if(forwardedPort&&!authority.includes(':')){const isDefault=(proto==='http'&&forwardedPort==='80')||(proto==='https'&&forwardedPort==='443'); if(!isDefault) authority=authority+':'+forwardedPort;} return proto+'://'+authority;}; const decodeBase64=(value)=>{const raw=value===null||value===undefined?'':String(value); if(!raw) return null; try{return Buffer.from(raw,'base64').toString('utf8');}catch{return null;}}; const decodedField=(primary,fallback='')=>{const decoded=decodeBase64(primary); return decoded!==null?decoded:fallback;}; const fallbackBaseUrl=clean(settings.n8n_base_url)||'http://n8n:5678'; const n8nBaseUrl=deriveBaseUrl(headers,fallbackBaseUrl); const action=clean(body.action); const templateId=parseId(body.template_id); const returnUrl=clean(body.return_url)||(n8nBaseUrl+'/webhook/email-template-editor'); const decodedSubject=clean(decodedField(body.subject_template_b64, body.subject_template)); const decodedText=decodedField(body.text_template_b64, body.text_template??''); const decodedHtml=decodedField(body.html_template_b64, body.html_template??''); const payload={action,template_id:templateId,template_key:clean(body.template_key),template_name:clean(body.template_name),template_type:parseType(body.template_type),subject_template:clean(body.subject_template),text_template:body.text_template??'',html_template:body.html_template??'',subject_template_b64:clean(body.subject_template_b64),text_template_b64:clean(body.text_template_b64),html_template_b64:clean(body.html_template_b64),is_active:parseBool(body.is_active),return_url:returnUrl,n8n_base_url:n8nBaseUrl,error_message:''}; if(action==='create_template'){ if(!payload.template_key) payload.error_message='Template key is required.'; else if(!payload.template_name) payload.error_message='Template name is required.'; } else if(action==='update_template'){ if(!payload.template_id) payload.error_message='A valid template is required.'; else if(!payload.template_key) payload.error_message='Template key is required.'; else if(!payload.template_name) payload.error_message='Template name is required.'; } else if(action==='delete_template'){ if(!payload.template_id) payload.error_message='A valid template is required.'; } else { payload.error_message='Unsupported action.'; } if(!payload.error_message&&action!=='delete_template'&&[decodedSubject,decodedText,decodedHtml].some(hasLiteralUndefined)){ payload.error_message='Template content contains literal "undefined". Restore the template variable placeholder before saving.'; } return [{json:payload}];

const input=$('Resolve Action Request').first()?.json??{}; const message=input.error_message||'Unable to complete the requested action.'; const redirectTo=(input.return_url||'#')+((input.return_url||'').includes('?')?'&':'?')+'error='+encodeURIComponent(message); const escapeHtml=(value)=>String(value??'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/\"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,'''); const html='Action failed

'+escapeHtml(message)+'

Continue

'; return [{json:{html}}];

const input=$input.first().json??{}; const sqlLiteral=(value)=>value===null||value===undefined?'NULL':"'"+String(value).replace(/'/g,"''")+"'"; const sqlBase64Utf8=(value)=>{const raw=value===null||value===undefined?'':String(value).trim(); return raw?"convert_from(decode('"+raw.replace(/'/g,"''")+"','base64'),'UTF8')":null;}; const subjectExpr=sqlBase64Utf8(input.subject_template_b64)||sqlLiteral(input.subject_template); const textExpr=sqlBase64Utf8(input.text_template_b64)||sqlLiteral(input.text_template); const htmlExpr=sqlBase64Utf8(input.html_template_b64)||sqlLiteral(input.html_template); let sql=''; let successTitle='Saved'; let successMessage='Template saved.'; if(input.action==='create_template'){ sql=['INSERT INTO public.email_templates (template_key, template_name, template_type, subject_template, text_template, html_template, is_active, created_at, updated_at)','VALUES ('+[sqlLiteral(input.template_key),sqlLiteral(input.template_name),String(input.template_type||0),subjectExpr,textExpr,htmlExpr,input.is_active?'TRUE':'FALSE','now()','now()'].join(', ')+')','RETURNING id::text AS template_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Template created'; successMessage='Template created.'; } else if(input.action==='update_template'){ sql=['UPDATE public.email_templates','SET template_key = '+sqlLiteral(input.template_key)+',','    template_name = '+sqlLiteral(input.template_name)+',','    template_type = '+String(input.template_type||0)+',','    subject_template = '+subjectExpr+',','    text_template = '+textExpr+',','    html_template = '+htmlExpr+',','    is_active = '+(input.is_active?'TRUE':'FALSE')+',','    updated_at = now()','WHERE id = '+String(input.template_id),'RETURNING id::text AS template_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Template updated'; successMessage='Template updated.'; } else if(input.action==='delete_template'){ sql=['WITH deleted AS (','  DELETE FROM public.email_templates WHERE id = '+String(input.template_id)+' RETURNING id',')','SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id),0)::text AS template_id FROM deleted'].join('
'); successTitle='Template deleted'; successMessage='Template deleted.'; } return [{json:{...input,sql,success_title:successTitle,success_message:successMessage}}];

const input=$('Build Action SQL').first()?.json??{}; const result=$input.first()?.json??{}; const clean=(value)=>value===null||value===undefined?'':String(value).trim(); const baseReturnPath=(input.return_url||'').split('?')[0]||''; let redirectTo=input.return_url||(input.n8n_base_url+'/webhook/email-template-editor'); if(input.action==='delete_template'){ redirectTo=baseReturnPath||input.n8n_base_url+'/webhook/email-template-editor'; } else { const templateId=clean(result.template_id)||clean(input.template_id); redirectTo=(baseReturnPath||input.n8n_base_url+'/webhook/email-template-editor')+(templateId?('?template_id='+encodeURIComponent(templateId)):''); } redirectTo += (redirectTo.includes('?') ? '&' : '?') + 'message=' + encodeURIComponent(input.success_message || 'Saved'); const escapeHtml=(value)=>String(value??'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/\"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,'''); const html=''+escapeHtml(input.success_title||'Saved')+'

Saved. Redirecting…

Continue

'; return [{json:{html}}];
